meta.title: Soheil Rostami — Frontend Developer
meta.description: Personal portfolio of Soheil Rostami, a frontend developer crafting fast, accessible and delightful web experiences with React and Next.js.

hero.name: Soheil Rostami
hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.tagline: I build fast, accessible and delightful web experiences with React & Next.js.

about.heading: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a frontend developer passionate about turning complex problems into simple, beautiful and intuitive interfaces. My focus is on the modern React ecosystem — Next.js, TypeScript and design systems.
about.paragraph2: Beyond writing clean, maintainable code, I care deeply about performance, accessibility and the small details that make a product feel polished. I enjoy learning new technologies and sharing what I learn along the way.

skills.heading: Tech Stack
skills.subheading: Technologies I work with every day

services.heading: Services
services.subheading: What I can do for you

webDevelopment.title: Web Application Development
webDevelopment.description: Modern, scalable web apps built with React and Next.js — from landing pages to complex dashboards.

responsiveDesign.title: Responsive UI Implementation
responsiveDesign.description: Pixel-perfect, fully fluid interfaces from Figma or any design, working beautifully on every screen size.

performance.title: Performance Optimization
performance.description: Faster load times and better Core Web Vitals through code splitting, caching, image optimization and profiling.

accessibility.title: Accessibility & SEO
accessibility.description: Semantic, WCAG-friendly markup and technical SEO so your product reaches everyone — and ranks well.

i18n.title: Multilingual & RTL Websites
i18n.description: Full internationalization with right-to-left support — ideal for Persian/English products.

maintenance.title: Code Review & Maintenance
maintenance.description: Refactoring legacy frontends, upgrading dependencies and keeping your codebase clean and healthy.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subheading: A selection of things I've built recently

shop.title: E-commerce Platform
shop.description: A full-featured online store with cart, checkout, product filtering and a Persian-first RTL interface. Built with Next.js App Router and Tailwind CSS.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.description: A data-rich admin panel with charts, tables, authentication and dark mode. Focused on performance and clean component architecture.

learning.title: Learning Platform
learning.description: An educational platform with course listings, lessons and progress tracking, featuring smooth page transitions and optimistic UI.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.subheading: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? My inbox is always open.
